title: Minister Pu Lalnghinglova Hmar chuan Bungzungah Mizo Sports Hall of Fame a hawng
content:
92/2026-2027

Dated Champhai, 8th April 2026:Sports & Youth Services Minister Pu Lalnghinglova Hmar chuan Bungzung khuaah Mizo Sports Hall of Fame chu khuallian niin a hawng a, East Tuipui Bialtu MLA Pu Ramthanmawia chuan khualzahawm niin a hmanpui bawk.

Khuallian Pu Lalnghinglova Hmar chuan thu sawiin, Tourism Department hian Champhai lam an hawi thu a sawi a, Mizo thul hlui zawng zawng tih theih chu Champhaiah a awm thu sawiin vawiina an hawn tak Mizo Sports Hall of Fame hi khualzin tam tak en luai luai a la nih tur thu a sawi a, khualzin lian tak tak te meeting neihpui theihna tur Mizoramah a la awm loh avangin buatsaih tura hma lak a nih dan tarlangin a hmun atan Champhai an thlan thu a tarlang tel bawk.

Hnahsin Kut 2026 neih leh turah pawh a hlawkna lo tel turin Bungzung pawh an tel ngei a rin thu a sawi a, Hnahsin Kut hmang tura rawn kal khualzinte chuan helamah an tleh phei hum hum a rin thu a sawi a, Bungzung bakah helam tlangdung khuaa Mizo hnam rohlu awmna te hian tlawh a hlawh hle dawn tih a sawi.

India National Games-ah Mizoram infiammite an lan theihna turin ruahmanna an siam, Empowering Mizo Sports chungchang a sawi a, hemi hnuaiah hian discipline 8 - Boxing, Wrestling, Weightlifting, Archery, Badminton, Judo, Taekwondo, Hockey duhthlan tur a awm thu leh chuta tang chuan an duh duh thlangin dilna an thehlut ang a, sawrkar chuan a thlawnin Coach a pe thin dawn a, coach te kalna leh thlan man hi khawtlangin a tum ang, tih a sawi a, hei hi naupang kum 8 atanga kum 15 chin tan a ni dawn a, training atana an mamawh zawng zawng pawh an pek vek tur thu a sawi a, chu chu a hmang tangkai khua nih tum ngei turin a chah a ni. Tun Financial Year-ah hian Hall of Fame cheibawlna atan cheng nuaih 10 (₹10 lakhs) dah a nih tur thu a sawi a, hei hi anmahni in bul an tan ngam vang a nih thu a tarlang tel.

Sports Minister hian Volleyball Court emaw Futsal ground (khawtlang duh dan azirin) siamna atan Cheng nuaih 15 dah a nih thu tarlangin Football leh volleyball bakah net a hlan nghal a, an kal zelna turah duhsakna a hlan bawk.

Khual zahawm Pu Ramthanmawia pawhin thu sawiin, Mizo Sports Hall of Fame hawn a nih theihna tura Bungzung khawtlang thawhhona leh an thawhrimna ropui a tih thu sawiin Mizoram tihmingthatute chawimawina ropui tak an buatsaih chu chhuanawm a tih thu a sawi a, an bialtu MLA takngial pawh hrilh hre duh lova anmahni sensoa an din ngam chu lawmawm a tih thu a sawi a, khawtin leh vengtin te entawn atan a duh thu a sawi. Khawtlang enkawlna kawngah sawrkar pawisa rin tum tlatna hi kalsan a hun tawh thu a sawi a, theihtawp an chhuah tawh hnua lo puih ve chu MLA te tan pawh a phurawm tawh thin a, bul pawh tan hmaa puihna in dil nghal ngawt hi sim a hun tih a sawi bawk.

South Tuipui bialtu MLA Pu Jeje Lalpekhlua bakah Pu S. Malsawmtluanga (Mama) Footballer te'n thu an sawi a, Aizawl Bungzung Welfare leh Champhai Bungzung Welfare te'n thu an sawi bawk.

He hun hi Pu Goldena, VCP, Mizo Sports Hall of Fame Chairman ni bawk chuan kaihruaiin Rev. Samuel Lalmuanpuia Pachuau, bialtu Pastor chuan hunserh a hmang a, Pu J. Zakhuma, Secretary, Mizo Sports Hall of Fame Committee chuan report pe in Pu T. Lalchhuanawma, Asst. Secretary hnen atangin infiammi chawimawite chanchin ngaihthlak a ni bawk.

Mizo Sports Hall of Fame ah hian infiammi pasarih - Pu K. Kawla (L), Pu Jeje Lalpekhlua, Pu S. Malsawmtluanga, Lalremsiami Hmar, Lalremsanga, Pu T. Zoramthanga (L) leh Jeremy Lalrinnunga te lim dah a ni.

Attachment

title: KOLASIB DISTRICT CHHUNGAH PHALNA NEI LOVA PETROL LEH DIESEL KHAWLKHAWM LEH HRALH KHAP A NI
content:
91/2026/2027

Kolasib, 8th April, 2026:Tunlai boruakah sorkar leh mipui tana harsatna thlen thei Petrol leh Diesel indaih lohna a awm theih avangin, Kolasib District Magistrate, Pu H. Dolianbuaia chuan Section 163, BNSS 2023 in thuneihna a pek angin thupek a chhuah.

He thupekah hian Kolasib District huam chhungah phalna nei lovin Petrol leh Diesel khawlkhawm leh hralh khap tlat a ni tih tarlan a ni. He ruahmanna hi mipui leh sorkar tana harsatna lian zawk a thlen loh nan leh, felfai zawk a dan ang taka Diesel leh Petrol hralhchhuah a nih theihna tura siam a ni.

District Magistrate thupek zawm lo leh bawhchhia te chu Section 223 BNS 2023 leh Section 23 of Petroleum Act 1934 hmanga man leh hrem theih an ni ang.

He thupek hi thupek chhuah a nih ni (6th April, 2026) atanga chhiarin thla hnih (2 months) chhung a huam dawn a ni.

title: SERCHHIP DISTRICT HOSPITAL HELNA TUR KAWNG SIAM DAN TUR NGAIHTUAHIN THUKHAWM
content:
90/2026-2027

Dated Serchhip, the 8th April 2026:Serchhip District Hospital-a damlo leh thawktute tana lirthei bengchheng leh thawm dang tih ziaawm a nih theih nan, vawiin khan Deputy Commissioner Pu Paul L. Khuma hovin thutkhawm pawimawh (meeting) neih a ni.

He meeting, DCs Meeting Hall-a neihah hian PWD Executive Engineer-in kawng siam dan tur ruahmanna (plan) leh a lem (map) te a tarlang a. Ngun taka ngaihtuaha, sawi ho a nih hnuin, hospital tana harsatna siam lo leh ram la hek lutuk lo zawnga kawng helna siam chu thil tul leh tha nia pawmtlan a ni a. Meeting zawhah hian a hmunah ngei kalin kawng lak tur chinte enfiah nghal a ni.

Vawiina Serchhip District Hospital Tuikhuah veng lam atanga hel dan tur ngaihtuahnaah hian NGO Co-ordination Committee, District leh Town VC, Serchhip Town Development Committee bakah Health department hotute leh sawrkar department aiawhte an tel a ni.

Attachment

title: LAWNGTLAI BAWRHSAP-IN KHAWPUI CHHUNGA DAMDAWIIN TE TLAWH
content:
89/2026-2027

Lawngtlai, 8th April 2026:Vawiin chawhnu khan Lawngtlai Bawrhsap Pu Donny Lalruatsanga chuan Lawngtlai khawpui chhunga damdawi In te a hmunah kalin a tlawh a, mamawh an neih hrang hrangte a enfiah a ni.

Pu Donny Lalruatsanga chuan District Hospital, Lawngtlai tlawh hmasa berin thawktuten an lo dawngsawng a. Damlo enkawlnaa an thawh kawngah fakin, thahnem ngai taka thawk zel turin a fuih a. District Hospital chu mi chanhai zawkten an pan nasa tih tarlangin, duat taka lo chiauau leh  enkawl turin a chah a ni. Bawrhsap chuan Civil Hospital tanmotor pek an nih tur thu sawiin, tangkai taka hman a nih a beisei thu a tarlang a ni. Bawrhsap chuan MUCHS 2.0 bikah uar zawka inzirtirna ( Awareness) kalpui a tul hle tih sawiin, a hma lamah Awareness Campaign' neih a nih tur thu a sawi a ni.

Civil Hospital - a Doctor - te hian mamawh an neih hrang hrang- quarters, incenarator, Doctor Indian lohna,  Dialysis bik khawih tur  doctor , X- ray room lian zawk leh thildangte bawrhsap hnenah hian an lo  thlen a. Bawrhsap chuan theih ang anga an mamawh zualpui phuhruk tura hmalak a nih tur thu a sawi a ni.

Christian Hospital Lawngtlai tlawhin, Medical Superintendent leh thawktuten an lo dawngsawng a. Hospital - in mamawh hrang hrang an neih- medical equipments, Tuidahna (Tanky), leh a dangte bawrhsap hnenah hian an lo thlen a. Bawrhsap chuan ziaka thlehlut tura chahin, a theih ang anga bawhzui a  tum thu a sawi a ni.

Lairam Christian Medical Centre & Hospital (LCMC&H) tlawhin Medical Superintendent leh thawktuten an lo dawngsawng a. Hospital - in mamawh an neih hrang hrang- Ultrasound, Computer set, leh a dangte an lo thlen a. Bawrhsap chuan 'LCMC& H'  in Nursing School - an din tur chu phurawm a tih thu sawiin, Chhimbial mai bakah hmun dang atanga zir duh tan a tangkai dawn hle a ni, a ti. Pu Donny Lalruatsanga chuan LCMC& H - ten mamawh an lo thlen ang angte bawhzui a tum thu tarlangin, ultrasound, computer set leh retaining wall- te chu bawhzui hmasak a nih tur thu a sawi a ni.

Lawngtlai Bawrhsap hi Pu Lalngheta Ralte (MJA,Lawngtlai) chuan a tawiawm a ni.

Attachment

title: LMC Vice Chairman Pu K. Lalrinawma leh MJA Lunglei District te'n Civil Hospital Lungleia hmasawnna thar awmte a hmunah an enfiah
content:
88/2026-2027

Lunglei, 2026 Ṭau thla ni 8:Lunglei Municipal Council (LMC) Vice Chairman Pu K. Lalrinawma leh Mizoram Journalists' Association (MJA) Lunglei District member-te chuan vawiin khan Civil Hospital Lunglei tlawhin, Civil Hospital Lungleia hmasawnna thar awm hrang hrangte a hmunah an enfiah.

Pu K. Lalrinawma hi LMC Ward No. 8-na Councillor Pi Malsawmkimi Khawlhring chuan ṭawiawmin, MJA Lunglei District member-te hi an President Pu H. Lalthansanga'n a ho bawk a. Civil Hospital Lungleia Senior Medical Superintendent Dr Laldinmawii leh a thawhpuite'n lo dawngsawngin, damdawi in hmunhmate an lo fanpui a ni.

LMC Vice Chairman leh MJA Lunglei District member-te hian Civil Hospital Lungleia cheng nuai 62.50 (₹62,50,000/-) senga hriselna lam endikna leh inenkawlna hmanraw dah tharte enin, Dr David Lalsangliana chuan hmanruate leh a thawh theihte a lo hrilhfiah.

Dr David Lalsangliana chuan Civil Hospital Lungleiah tun hma lama an tih theih loh, thisen zam chat avanga kawchhunga thi put (internal bleeding) awm tihrehna (bending tihna) ṭha tak an neih tawh thu sawiin, nikuma an hman ṭan aṭangin mi 44 bending an tihsak tawh thu a sawi a. Pumpui ṭhuah faina leh tui siak chhuahna te, naupang tan bika hman tur pumpui leh chawkawng enna bakah, pum chhung aṭanga thil dawlh palh lak chhuahna thlengin hmanrua an neih tawh thu a sawi.

Thawktute chuan Civil Hospital Lungleia tun hmaa an tih theih loh, Biopsy lakna hmanrua pawh a awm tawh thu sawiin, Laboratory-a test erawh an la tih theih loh thu an sawi a. An hmanraw neih tharte chu ṭangkai taka hman a nih thu an sawi.

LMC Vice Chairman Pu K. Lalrinawma leh MJA hruaitute chuan Civil Hospital Lungleia Intensive Care Unit (ICU), khum pathum awmna pawh a hmunah tlawhin an en nghal a. Civil Hospital Lungleia Oxygen Plant pawh enin, COVID-19 hri len laia Oxygen Plant bun thar, tun dinhmuna hman theih lohva awm mek chu siam ṭhat thuai ṭul an tih thu an sawi.

LMC Vice Chairman chuan Health & Family Welfare Minister Pi Lalrinpuii'n Mizorama Health Care Facility ṭha zawk neih chu a vei thu leh a hma lakna zarah hmasawnna tam tak hmuh a nih thu sawiin, Mizoram sawrkar zara Civil Hospital Lungleia thil thar leh hmel thar tam tak hmuh a ni leh tun hmaa hmun hla zawk pan ngaihna ang tam takah Civil Hospital Lungleiin mipui mamawh a phuhru thei ta chu lawmawm a tih thu a sawi a. Senior Medical Superintendent Dr Laldinmawii leh thawktute pawh fakin, an ṭhahnem ngaihna leh inpekna avanga damdawi in hmelhmang leh faina kawngah te, hmanraw ṭha zawk neih kawngah te danglamna leh hmasawnna tam tak a awm chu lawmawm a tih thu a sawi bawk.

title: SIAHA DISTRICT LEVEL VIBRANT VILLAGE PROGRAMME II ṬHUTKHAWM A NI
content:
87/2026-2027

Dated Siaha, the April 8, 2026:Vawiin chawhma dar 11:00A.M khan DC Mini Conference Hall, Siahaah Siaha District Level Vibrant Village Programme - II (VVP-II) member-te an ṭhukhawm a, Additional DC Pu Abraham Beirazi Khithie chuan a kaihruai a, draft village annual action plan (VVP-II) 2026-2027 thlirhona leh pawmpuina hun neih a ni.

Member Secretary Pu M. Misael, Project Director, DRDO nibawk kaihhruaina hnuaiah Siaha district chhunga RD Block pahnih - Siaha leh Tipa khaw 9 aṭanga village council 16-te Gram sabha meeting-in anmahni khua ṭheuh hmasawnna tura an duan district level-a thlirho tura chhawpchhuah chu enho a ni a, siamrem ngai lai siamrema sawiho anih hnuin a vaiin pawm a ni a, State level-a pawmpui turin thawn a ni leh ang.

Vawiin ṭhutkhawmah hian department official, Assam rifles leh MADC official-te an tel a, Chairman Pu Abraham Beirazi Khithie chuan lawmthu sawina a nei a, hun hman tihtawp a ni.

title: KHAWZAWL KVK-IN LEITHA PEK DAN CHUNGCHANG ZIRTIRNA HUN NEI
content:
86/2026-2027

Dated Khawzawl, the 8th April, 2026 :Vawiin khan KVK Khawzawl chuan KVK Training Hall-ah leitha pek dan chungchang inzirtirna hun an hmang a. He hun hi Dr. Malsawmkimi, Senior Scientist & Head KVK chuan a kaihruai a, Pi R. Vanlalduati, Subject Matter Specialist, (Soil Sc.) KVK Khawzawl chuan he huna kalkhawmte hnenah leitha inbuk tawk lo peka nghawng tha lo thleng thei te sawiin, zirtirna a pe a ni.

Dr. Malsawmkimi chuan thlaichi a chin hun taka semchhuah a ni thei chu lawmawm a tih thu sawiin, chhungtinte mahni kan intodelh theih a thatzia leh phailam atanga chahchhuahte aia mahni tharchhuah ngei ei a hrisel thu kalkhawm te hnenah a sawi bawk a. IARI-NEH Scheme hnuai atangin thlai chi chi hrang hrang Khawzawl district chhunga khaw hrang hrang atanga lo kal mi 210-te hnenah an pe chhuak bawk.

85/2026-2027

Dated:Mamit the 8th of April, 2026 :Fisheries Department Office,Mamit-ah PMMSY SCHEME (2026-2027) hnuaiah, a hnuaia components tarlan te hi office hun chhungin a dil theih e;

title: Minister Pu Lalnghinglova Hmar chuan Khawbungah International Seminar on Mizo Hlakungpui Mual Thawh Rukna hmanpui
content:
84/2026-2027

Dated Champhai, 8th April 2026:Tourism Minister Pu Lalnghinglova Hmar chuan vawiin khan International Seminar on Mizo Hlakungpui Mual Thawh Rukna, 2026, Khawbunga neih chu khuallian niin a hmanpui. Adviser to CM Pu Lalmuanpuia Punte chu khual zahawm a ni bawk.

Khuallian Pu Lalnghinglova Hmar chuan thu sawiin, Khawbung khua chu mahni inchawimawi thiam tak leh khaw inlungrual an nih thu leh khaw entawn tlak tak an nih thu a sawi a, khawi hmunah pawh awm ila, mahni chawrchhuahna hre reng te an hmingmawi thin, a ti a, ram dang leh state dang mah hian haw runpui pawh an nei ve ngai lova, Mizo te chauh nei thin an nih thu a sawi a, an khua an hmangaihna chu an thil neih ropui tak a nih thu sawiin an khua an hmangaihna pung zel turin a chah. Cheng nuaih 25 sengin Khawbung Volleyball Court an siam tur thu a tarlang a, football leh volleyball bakah Volleyball net te a hlan a, Mizo Hlakungpui mual seminar puala buatsaih souvenir "Zo Tui" tih lehkhabu a tlangzarh nghal a ni. Minister hian Mizo Hlakungpui Mual a tlawh nghal a ni.

Khual zahawm Pu Lalmuanpuia Punte chuan thu sawiin Pu Patea leh Pu Damhauha te pahniha bultan a, Hlakungpui mual an buatsaih chu tunah Mizoram puma hlut hlawh khawpa an buatsaih thei chu lawmawm a tih thu a sawi a, Pu Patea leh Pu Damhauha te chanchin ziahna lehkhabu a tlangzarh ve bawk.

He hun hi Khawbung Vengpui Kohhran Centenary Hall-ah hman niin Pu H. Lalnunmawia, Vice Chairman, Hlakungpui Mual Committee chuan a kaihruai a, Mizo hlakungpui muala seng luhte thu leh hla zirho a ni. Kum 1986 khan a thawh khatna neih a ni a, kum 1996 khan a thawh hnihna neiin kum 2006 khan a thawh thumna neih leh a ni a, kum 2011-ah a thawh li na neiin kum 2016 khan a thawh ngana neih leh a ni a, kumin hi a thawh rukna a ni. Resource person te chu Zalianthanga, Journalist, Tahan; Lalzuitluanga, Assistant Professor, Churachandpur College; leh Dr. Sangrozami, Associate Professor, Govt. J. Thankima College te an ni.

title: Transport Department hnuaia hnalak chungchanga hriattirna
content:
83/2026-2027

Aizawl the 8th April, 2026 :State Election Commissioner, Mizoram in AMC in thlan hun Dt 21.4.2026 atan a puan tak avangin (Vide No.B.14015/l/2026-SEC/AMC/42 Dt 18.3.2026, Transport Department hnuaia Enforcement-Sub- Inspector hnalak kal mek ah Dt 27 & 30.3.2026 a Personal Interview neih turah tih khaDt 6.5.2026leh Dt 7.5.2026sawn a ni tih kan in hriattir a.

Dt 17.3.2026 a Notice kan lo chhuah tawh angin interview na hmun tur hiSecretary, Transport Deparment, MINECO, Main Building, 2ndFloor, Room No. 228 & 229 a ni anga. Dt 6.5.2026 ah SI No 1- 24, Dt 7.5.2026 ah SI no 25 - 48 ten interview hi neih tur a niang.

Candidate ten mahni document original ken vek tur a ni e.

title: Secondary Collection Centre-a Sawhthing buk chungchanga Aizawl Bawrhsap hriattirna
content:
82/2026-2027

Aizawl the 8th April, 2026 :Aizawl District huam chhunga Secondary Collection Centre zawng zawnga sawhthing buk chungchangah Agriculture & Farmer's Welfare Department-in ni. 5.1.2026-a Standard Operating Procedure (Point No.12) a lo tihchhuah tawh chu zawm tur a ni a. Sawhthing buk rih zawng hi SCC a luh dawnah emaw PCC atanga a chhuah dawnah kan lo buk a nih pawhin a hralh dawna a buk rih zawng kan chhinchhiah chauh kha pawisa dawn nana chhut tur a ni.

Hei hi SCC leh PCC hruaitute leh SCC Supervisor leh Assistant Supervisor ten tha takazawm theuh tur a ni e.

title: KHAWZAWL CHHUNGA KOHHRAN HRANG HRANG HRUAITUTE HNENAH DRUGS LEH HIV/AIDS CHUNGCHANG INHRILHHRIATNA HUN NEI
content:
81/2026-2027

Dated Khawzawl, the 8th April, 2026 :Vawiin khan District AIDS Prevention & Control Committee (DAPCC), District Nasha Mukt Bharat Abhiyan (NMBA) leh District Narco-Coordination Centre (NCORD) tangkawp buatsaihin Khawzawl district chhunga kohhran hrang hrang hruaitute hnenah drugs leh HIV/AIDS chungchang inhrilhhriatna hun DC Conference Hall-ah neih a ni a. He hun hi Khawzawl Bawrhsap Pu K. Vanlalthiana, DAPCC Chairman ni bawk chuan a kaihruai a ni.

DAPCC Chairmain Pu K. Vanlalthiana chuan thusawiin, Khawzawl chu drugs leh HIV awm lohna hmuna siam tur chuan khawtlang leh kohhran nena thawhho a pawimawh thu a sawi a. Kan rama HIV do rem tur chuan mitinte HIV kan in test-a, kan dinhmun kan hriatchiana, HIV veite chu midang hnena kaichhawng lo tura treatment an lak that a pawimawh thu a sawi bawk a. HIV hi natna dang aiin thinhrik a hlawh bik avangin kohhran hruaitu kalkhawmte chu khawtlanga HIV veite diriamna leh enhranna a tlemna turin leh drugs leh HIV chak zawka do turin thawhho puiah a sawm a ni.

Chief Medical Officer (CMO) Dr. Shahnaz M. Zothanzami chuan HIV hrik chungchang, a inkaichhawn dan, inven dan leh inenkawl dan inhrilhhriatna hun a hmang a. HIV hrik paia inrinhlelhna neite chuan in test ngeia, a vawikhatnaa test a negative pawhin in test nawn ngeia, HIV veite chu midang hnena kaichhawng lo tur khawpa an taksaa hrik a tlem nan ART ei that a pawimawh thu a sawi a. Mizoramah HIV veite zingah mipat hmeichhiatna avanga inkaichhawng an tam ber avangin HIV laka inven dan ABC approach a sawifiah a. Approach tha ber ‘A’ chu Abstinence, mipat-hmeichhiatna laka fihlim a ni a, ‘B’ chu Be faithful, kawppui pakhat laka rinawm a ni a, ‘C’ chu Condom hman a ni a. Kum 15-49 inkar, mihringin hna an thawh theih hunlai ber leh hmeichhiaten nau an pai theih hunlaia HIV an vei chuan anmahni chauh nilovin chhungkua, khawtlang leh ram thlengin a nghawng avangin HIV do kawngah tan kan lak nasat a ngaih thu a sawi.

Khawzawl Addl. SP Pu Zosangliana pawhin he hunah hian drugs hmansual leh a titute hriselna mai bakah chhungkua leh khawtlanga nghawng thalo a neihte sawina hun a hmang a. Kum 1984 atangin October 2025 thleng khan Mizoramah drugs hmansual avanga thi mi 1,952 an awm tawh thu leh January - October 2025 chhung khan mi 73 thi an awm tawh thu a tarlang a. Zuk leh hmuam hi drugs kailawn (gateway to drugs) a ni tih sawiin zuk leh hmuam lakah pawh kan filhlim a pawimawh thu a sawi a. Tun hnaiah Mizoram thalaite zingah ganja ti an tam thu tarlangin ruihhlo ngaite tan nghei a har tawh thin avangin ruihhlo laka fihlima tihchhin loh hi a that ber thu a sawi bawk.

Thusawitu dang District AIDS Control Officer Dr. Albert Lalhminghlua chuan Mizoramah HIV prevalance (mi cheng zat za zela chhuta HIV vei hmuhchhuah tawh leh hmuhchhuah thar belhkhawm) chu 2.73% niin, India ramah a sang ber kan nih thu leh Mizoram district hrang hrang zingah HIV prevalence-ah Khawzawl chu 5-na a nih thu a tarlang a. Prevalance sanna chhan hi Mizorama HIV vei hmuhchhuah tawhten ART an ei thata an dam rei avang a nih thu sawiin, kum 2016 atang khan Mizoramah HIV vei hmuhchhuah thar (incidence) erawh a tlem tual tual tih a sawi.

Mizoram State Positive Network dintu Pi Lalruatfeli pawhin HIV lama a tawnhriatte sawina hun neiin, HIV veite chu an dinhmun zahpui tur an nih loh thu leh midang hnena hrik kaichhawng thei lo tur khawpa ART an ei that chuan kawppuite hnenah pawh hrik kaichhawng lovin chhungkua pawh an din theih thu a sawi a. Khawtlang leh kohhran hruaitute chu HIV veite leh ruihhlo ngaite tan pawha ban phaka an awm a pawimawh thu a sawi.

Vawiin thutkhawmah hian kohhran hruaitute thahnem tak an tel a, HIV leh drugs do kawnga hma lak zel dan turte sawihona hun neih a ni.

Attachment

title: April ni 8, 2026 a LPG leh POL dinhmun
content:
80/2026-2027

title: Minister Prof. Lalnilawma'n Ruantlang Water Supply Scheme (Solar Pumping) a hawng
content:
79/2026-2027

Dated Champhai, 8th April 2026:PHED Minister Prof. Lalnilawma'n vawiin khan NABARD RIDF hnuaia sak Ruantlang Water Supply Scheme (Solar Pumping) a hawng a, Vanhnuailiana Hall, Ruantlanga a lawmna hunah khuallian a ni nghal bawk. He hunah hian Champhai South bialtu MLA Lt. Col. Clement Lalhmingthanga chu khual zahawm niin a tel bawk a ni.

Khuallian Prof. Lalnilawma chuan Ruantlang Water Supply Scheme hawn theih a ni ta hi lawmawm a tih thu a sawi a, Champhaia PHE hnuaia hnathawk te leh khawtlang hruaitute hnathawh hona tha tak avang a ni tih sawiin District hotute leh PHED pawh Ruantlang mipui lawm ang chiahin an lawm ve em em a ni tih a sawi a. Hnathawh nasa taka a kal hnuah vawiin hi an thleng thei tih sawiin a hmunhma leh a khawl te enkawlna kawngah Ruantlang mipuite an pawimawh a, hnathawh tawh te a thlawn loh nan uluk taka enkawl turin a chah a ni. Harsatna leh buaina erawh awm thei a ni a, a hmunah engineer leh hnathawk tha tak tak an awm a, anni hi rawn theih reng an ni tih a hrilh bawk. Ruantlang mipuiin he Water Supply Scheme hi tangkai taka an hman theih nan duhsakna hlanin a hawng a ni.

Khual zahawm Lt. Col. Clement Lalhmingthanga pawhin thu sawiin mitinin nitin kan mamawh tui pek chhuahna tur tha tak an ngaihtuah chhuah avangin PHED Minister leh PHED engineer te chungah lawmthu a sawi a, Ruantlang mipuiin hlawk taka an hman theih nan duhsakna hlanin uluk taka enkawl turin a fuih bawk a ni.

He hun hi PHED Chief Engineer Er. Lalropuia'n hun a kaihruai a, PHED Champhai WATSAN Division Executive Engineer Er. Jerome Lalremtluanga'n Water Supply Scheme chungchang technical report a pe a. Ruantlang VCP Pu Bethlehem Tlangchullova'n Ruantlang mipui aiawhin thu a sawi a, PHED Chief Engineer Er. K. Zohmingliana'n lawmthu sawiin hun a khar a ni.

Ruantlang Water Supply Scheme (Solar Pumping) hi NABARD RIDF XXIX hnuaia sak a ni a, cheng nuai sang hnih za hnih sawmkua panga (₹2295.88 lakhs) sen niin he sum sena zaa sawmkua (90%) hi NABARD tum a ni. A chawm theih zat hi 70 lpcd a ni a, four stage pumping niin thla 21 chhungin zawh a ni.

Attachment

title: TOURISM MINISTER HOVIN CHAMPHAIAH HNAHSIN KUT CHUNGCHANG SAWIHO
content:
78/2026-2027

Champhai, the 8th of April, 2026:Nimin chawhnu dar 4:00 khan Pu Lalnghinglova Hmar, Minister, Tourism Department hovin Tourism Department, Champhai Nature Conservancy (CNC), Champhai North Joint VC leh Champhaia NGO hrang hrang aiawhte an inkawm a, Hnahsin Kut kalpui zel dan tur leh, kut lian chho zel dawnsawn dan tur an sawiho.

Tourism Minister Pu Lalnghinglova Hmar chuan Champhai khawtlang leh mipui tangrualin Mizorama kut lian ber pakhat an buatsaih thei chu lawmawm a tih thu a sawi a. "Mizoram chhung leh pawn atangin Hnahsin Kut chhim tur an lo la kal belh zel dawn a, mikhual an la pung zel dawn. Mikhual dawnsawn kawngah Champhai khawpui inpuahchah a ngai a, a bikin Tourism kaihhnawiha eizawngte uar zawka zirtirna pek an ngai" a ti.

Minister chuan Champhai District chu pi pute hmun pawimawh tamna a ni tih sawiin, Hnahsin Kut hmanga Champhaia tlawhtute'n district chhung hmun danga tourist site tha tak takte an tlawh tel theihna'n ngaihtuahna sen tul a tih thu a sawi a. "Hnahsin par leh Champhai district mawina behchhanin Hnahsin kut kalpui dan herrem hret theih niin a lang a. Chutiang tur chuan vawiinah hian in rawtna te ngaithla a, sawiho turin kan lo kal a ni." a ti.

Meeting-ah hian Hnahsin Kut kalpui mek dana hmasawn ngaihna lai leh, kut hman dan tihmasawn tura kil hrang hrang atanga rawtna awmte sawiho a ni a. A bultanna’n Champhaia tourism kaihhnawiha eizawng hrang hrang, a bikin homestay, hotel leh restaurant neitute leh tour guide te chu June thla hmain Tourism Department in training pe se tih a ni. A koh khawm leh ruahmanna siam kawngah meeting-a telte chu mawhphurtu ni nghal vek se tih a ni bawk a ni.

CNC in a ngen tawh angin, Hnahsin Kut buatsaih kawnga thawhho dan tur chungchang pawh Tourism Department leh CNC aiawhte'n sawiho nghal a ni a. A buatsaih leh funding kaihhnawih hautak chho zelah, ‘community-based festival’ a nihna bo si lovin sawrkar nen mumal zawka thawhho dan tur ngaihtuah a ni. Sawrkarin festival a buatsaih dan kalphungte sawiho nghal a ni bawk.

Vawiina Champhaia Hnahsin Kut chungchang sawihonaah hian Pi R. Lalrodingi, Director, Tourism Department leh Pi C. Ramsangzuali, Tourist Officer ten Tourism Minister hi an tawiawm a. Champhai Nature Conservancy, Champhai North Joint VC, Zotlang VC leh Sub-Headquarters YMA, Champhai Disrict MJA, MHIP, MUP, MZP aiawhte an tel a ni.

Attachment

title: SEIZURE OF DRUGS BY CHAMPHAI POLICE
content:
14/2026-2027

Champhai Police have recently seized a total of 100 grams of heroin, valued at approximately ₹20 lakhs, in two separate cases, as detailed below:

1.On 07.04.2026 at around 4:30 PM, a team of Champhai Police, while on patrol duty near Chhungte Village (beyond Chalbawiha Junction, Khankawn Check Gate), noticed a suspicious individual sitting by the roadside in an area known for smuggling activities. Upon questioning, the individual identified himself as Lalbuatsaiha (21) of Tlangsam Village and admitted to concealing contraband in a nearby bush.

Acting on his disclosure, a search was conducted in the presence of independent witnesses, leading to the recovery of 48 grams (packed in 4 soap cases) of suspected heroin, valued at ₹9,60,000, from a black polythene bag. One mobile phone was also seized. The accused was arrested, and a case was registered at Champhai Police Station vide C/No. 51/26 dated 07.04.2026 under Section 21(b) of the ND&PS Act.

Further investigation led to the arrest of two additional accomplices, namely Lawmnasanga (40), S/o R. Lalrinmawia of Khawhai Village, and Lalrinthangi (35), D/o Zohmingliana of Tlangsam Village, who were identified as backward link operatives in the case.

2. On 06.04.2026 at around 7:00 AM, Champhai Police, while conducting routine vehicle checking at Chalbawia Junction, Khankawn Check Gate, intercepted a Sumo vehicle (Regn. No. MZ-02B-0743) travelling from Champhai to Aizawl. During the checking, 52 grams of suspected heroin, concealed in 3 soap cases and 2 plastic containers, valued at ₹10,40,000, were recovered and seized from the illegal possession of one passenger, Lalpekthuama (30) of Seling (Bethel). A case was registered at Champhai Police Station vide C/No. 52/26 dated 06.04.2026 under Section 21(b) of the ND&PS Act for further investigation. Further investigation is ongoing in both cases to identify and apprehend other persons involved.

Attachment

title: CHAMPHAI POLICE TEN RUIHHLO MAN
content:
77/2026-2027

Champhai Police chuan a hnuaia tarlan ang hian tunhnaiah Heroin gram 100, cheng nuai 20 man hu an man:

1. Dt 07.04.2026 tlai dar 4:30 PM khan Champhai Police team, Chhungte dai (Chalbawiha Junction, Khankawn Check Gate piah)-a patrolling te chuan mi pakhat, kawng sira thu chu ringhlelin thu an zawt fiah a, he mi hi Lalbuatsaiha (21), Tlangsam khua nia insawiin, a bulhnai hnim karah ruihhlo a thuhruk thu a sawi a ni.

A inpuanna bawhzuiin a sawina lai vel hi dap a ni a, Heroin gram 48, (hawng 4),₹ 9,60,000/- man hu, sarang duma dah hmuh a ni. Amah bakah hian mobile phone pakhat man tel niin, Champhai Police Station C/No. 51/26 dated 07.04.2026 under Section 21(b) of the ND&PS Act ziah luh a ni.

Chhui zuina atangin he thila inhnamhnawih midang pahnih, Lawmnasanga (40), S/o R. Lalrinmawia, Khawhai khua leh Lalrinthangi (35), D/o Zohmingliana, Tlangsam khua te pawh man belh leh an ni.

2. Dt. 06.04.2026 zing dar 7:00 AM khan Champhai Police, Chalbawia Junction, Khankawn Check Gate-a duty te chuan lirthei veivak an check a, Sumo pakhat (Regn. No. MZ-02B-0743) Champhai atanga Aizawl lam pana kal chu check in, Heroin gram 52, sahbawn bawm 3 leh plastic bawm 2 a dah, ₹10,40,000 man hu chu a mi chuang pakhat, Lalpekthuama (30), Seling (Bethel) hnen atangin an man. Champhai Police Station C/No. 52/26 dated 06.04.2026 under Section 21(b) of the ND&PS Act ziah luha chhui chhunzawm zel a ni.

title: Union Minister of State for Jal Shakti visits Saitual District
content:
13/2026-2027

Saitual, April 8, 2026:The Union Minister of State for Jal Shakti, Dr. Raj Bhushan Choudhary paid an official visit to Saitual District, where he reviewed developmental activities and interacted with government officials and local leaders.

During his visit, the Minister held a meeting with officials from various departments and local leaders, who highlighted their needs and the challenges faced in the district. In his address, Dr. Choudhary assured full support from the Government of India and reiterated his commitment to facilitating the district’s progress across multiple sectors. The meeting was chaired by the Deputy Commissioner, Pu Srinivas Sadi, who delivered a detailed presentation on departmental activities and achievements using PowerPoint.

As part of his visit, the Minister, accompanied by the Deputy Commissioner, Pu Srinivas Sadi, and the Superintendent of Police, Pu Gaurav Tyagi, inspected the water reservoir at Sihfa village constructed under the Jal Jeevan Mission (JJM). He was received by Er. Lalpektluanga, Senior Executive Engineer (PHED), and Er. Lalzuala, Sub-Divisional Officer (PHED).

Dr. Choudhary also visited the District Hospital, where he reviewed healthcare services and infrastructure. He was received by Dr. Zothanpari Chhakchhuak, Deputy Chief Medical Officer.

The visit underscores the Government’s continued focus on strengthening water supply infrastructure and public service delivery in Saitual District.

Attachment

title: Union Minister of State for Jal Shakti-in Saitual District a tlawh
content:
75/2026-2027

Saitual, the 8th April, 2026:Union Minister of State for Jal Shakti, Dr. Raj Bushan Choudhary chuan Saitual District a tlawh a, vawiin khan sawrkar department hotute leh khawtlang hruaitute kawmin, Sihfaa khuaa Jal Jeevan Mission (JJM) scheme hnuaia water reservoir sak te leh District Hospital te a tlawh bawk a ni.

Dr. Raj Bushan Choudhary chuan Saitual District-a sawrkar department hotute leh khawtlang hruaitute a kawm a, kalkhawmte chuan Union Minister of State hnenah an mamawhte leh an harsatna tawh te an thlen nghal a ni. Dr. Raj Bushan Choudhary chuan Saitual District-in kawng hrang hranga hma a lo sawn theihna tura pui turin a inhuam thu a sawi a, theih tawp a chhuah zel tur thu a sawi bawk. He thutkhawm hi District Bawrhsap Pu Srinivas Sadi chuan a kai hruai a, Department hrang hrang hna thawh te powerpoint hmangin a sawi zau bawk a ni.

Union Minister of State for Jal Shakti hian nimin khan Sihfa khuaa Jal Jeevan Mission hnuaia reservoir sak a tlawh a, he hunah hian Er. Lalpektluanga, Sr. EE, PHED leh Er. Lalzuala, SDO te chuan an lo dawng sawng a. Vawiin khan District Hospital tlawhin, Dr. Zothanpari Chhakchhuak, Dy. CMO chuan a lo dawng sawng bawk a ni.

Attachment

title: Minister Pu Lalnghinglova Hmar chuan Vangchhiaah Development of Basic Amenities project lungphum a phum
content:
74/2026-2027

Dated Champhai, 8th April 2026:Tourism Minister Pu Lalnghinglova Hmar chuan vawiin khan Lal Mual, Vangchhiaah PRASHAD Scheme hnuaia sak tur Development of Basic Amenities lungphum a phum.

Minister Pu Lalnghinglova Hmar chuan Vangchhia khua chu engdang mahin pawlh dal lo tura a duh thu sawiin khualzin tu pawh lo kal sela, danglam vak tum lovin an nihna sa angin lo dawngsawng tawp turin a chah a, khualzin te hian a khaw mite nunphung an hmu duh thin tih sawiin an khua awm dan anga lo awm ve mai kha khualzinte tih thin dan a nih avangin anmahni lo danglam a ngaih loh thu a sawi.

Minister chuan Vangchhia khua in khualzin an hipna kawngah an khuain an hlawkpui a, riahpui theih tur ngaihtuah a tul thu a sawi a, chu lam kawngah chuan ngaihtuahna seng tura chahin Tourism Department pawhin theihtawp a chhuah tur thu sawiin culture based tourism kalpui a nih tur thu a sawi bawk.

Champhai District hi khualzin hipna hmun tha tak a nih thu leh nasa zawka khualzin hip zel tura tan lak an tum thu a tarlang a, Champhaiah Event lian buatsaih a nihin helam tlangdungah khualzin tam tak an kal theihna tur ruahmanna siam a nih tur thu a sawi a, chutiang atan chuan Development of Basic Amenities lungphum hi phum a nih thu a sawi a, riahchilh a tlawh duh tan pawh riahchilh theih turin hma an lak tur thu leh a hlawkpui tu ber tur chu Vangchhia an nih tur thu a sawi bawk.

Khualzinte'n Mizorama tlawh an duhte chu siamchawp ni lovin a awm sa hi en an duh thin tih a sawi a, Vangchhia pawhin Mizo te tana hmun pawimawh siamchawp ni lo an neih mek chu tihlar zel kawngah Tourism Department chuan theihtawp a chhuah tur thu a sawi a, Development of Basic Aminities lungphum a phum nghal a ni. Minister hian Kawtchhuah ropui a tlawh nghal a ni.

Pu Lalmuanpuia Punte, Adviser to CM pawhin thusawiin, sawrkar in nasa takin Tourism lamah hma a la mek a, khualzin tam takin Mizoram an tlawh mup mup mek tih a sawi a, Culture Tourism lam kalpui a tul thu leh Tourism Minister pawh helam kawngah tan nasa taka a la chu lawmawm a tih thu a sawi.

Development of Basic Amenities hi PRASHAD Scheme hnuaia Project niin Vangchhia Cultural & Heritage Centre tia hming vuahin cheng nuaih 547.32 hmanga sak tur a ni.

Attachment

title: Prizes Distributed for Easter Egg Painting Competition to Promote Anti-Drug Awareness in Lunglei
content:
12/2026-2027

Lunglei, 8 April 2026:The District Level Committee on NCORD, Lunglei, in collaboration with the Nasha Mukt Bharat Abhiyaan, organised an Easter Egg Painting Competition under the theme "Ruihhlo Do" as part of its ongoing efforts to raise awareness about the ill effects of substance abuse among children and youth. The prize distribution ceremony was held today at the DC's Conference Hall, Lunglei.

The competition was conducted on Easter Sunday, 5th April 2026, across various churches within the Lunglei Municipal Council (LMC) area. Conceived as an awareness initiative, the programme encouraged children and youth to creatively convey anti-drug messages through Easter egg painting and slogan-bearing placards.

Participants from different churches took active part by designing Easter eggs and placards carrying messages against substance abuse. Winners were selected based on photographs of the entries submitted by the respective churches, and the prizes were formally distributed during today's programme.

Speaking on the occasion, Deputy Commissioner, Lunglei, Pi Navneet Mann, stated that the competition was not only part of the Easter celebrations but also a meaningful initiative to promote a healthy and drug-free lifestyle among the people of Lunglei. She appreciated all participants and organisers for making the programme a success. Highlighting the harmful impact of substance abuse, she noted that drugs adversely affect both physical and mental health, deplete financial resources, and create serious challenges for families and society. She urged all citizens, especially the youth, to stay away from drugs and actively support the fight against substance abuse.

The programme was chaired by Additional Deputy Commissioner Pi Zoramdini, while Sub-Deputy Commissioner Pi Lalhlimpuii Pachuau presented a report on the competition. The prizes, along with certificates, were distributed by the Deputy Commissioner. The programme concluded with a vote of thanks delivered by Sub-Divisional Police Officer Pu R. Lalthankima.

List of Prize Winners:

1st Prize: Malsawmzeli, PCI Chanmari (₹3,000/- + Certificate)

2nd Prize: Olivia Zorinzuali, BCM KNP Chanmari Unit (₹2,000/- + Certificate)

3rd Prize: Brianna Lalngaihawmi, PCI Chanmari (₹1,000/- + Certificate)

Special Mention (₹500/- + Certificate):

Attachment

title: Lungleiah District Level Committee on NCORD huaihawta ruihhlo dona atana Easter Egg incheisiak lawmman sem a ni
content:
73/2026-2027

Lunglei, 2026 Ṭau thla ni 8:Lunglei District Level Committee on NCORD leh Nasha Mukt Bharat Abhiyaan ṭang kawp huaihawta naupang leh ṭhalaite zinga ruihhlo ṭhat lohzia inzirtirna peng khat atana "Ruihhlo Do" tih thupui hmanga Lunglei Municipal Council (LMC) huam chhunga kohhran hrang hrangte tana "Easter Egg Painting Competition" (Easter artui incheisiak) buatsaiha lawmmante chu vawiin khan Lunglei DC Conference Hall-ah sem a ni.

He intihsiakna hi naupang leh ṭhalaite zinga ruihhlo ṭhat lohzia inzirtirna leh ruihhlo laka fihlim tura infuih tharna atana ruahman niin, Easter Sunday, April ni 5, 2026 khan Lunglei khawpui chhunga kohhran hrang hrangah kalpui a ni a. Kohhran hrang hrang hian an kohhran member naupang leh ṭhalaite tan ruihhlo dona lam hawia artui incheisiak leh ruihhlo dona au hla chuanna placard insiamsiak hi huaihawtin, artui chei sa leh placard thlalak theh luh aṭangin lawmman dawng turte hi thlan chhuah an ni a. Vawiin khan lawmman hi a dawngtute kutah hlan a ni.

Lunglei District Bawrhsap Pi Navneet Mann chuan he intihsiakna hi Easter Sunday lawmna peng khat a nih bakah, Lunglei mipuite'n ruihhlo tel lova nun hlim leh hrisel an neih theih nana buatsaih a nih thu sawiin, intihsiakna tihlawhtlingtute chungah lawm thu a sawi a. Ruihhlo chu mihring taksa leh rilru ei chhetu bakah, sum khawh ralna leh chhungkua leh khawtlang tana hnawksak a nih thu sawiin, ruihhlo laka inthiar fihlim a, do tlat turin ṭhalaite leh District mipuite a chah.

Lawmman semna hun hi Lunglei Additional Deputy Commissioner Pi Zoramdini'n a kaihruai a. Sub-Deputy Commissioner Pi Lalhlimpuii Pachuau chuan intihsiakna report pein, lawmman dawngtute kutah Bawrhsap chuan lawmman pawisa fai leh certificate a hlan a. Sub-Divisional Police Officer Pu R. Lalthankima'n lawm thu sawiin hun a khar.

Lunglei District Easter Egg Painting Competition 2026-a lawmman dawngtute chu:

1st Prize: Malsawmzeli, PCI Chanmari (₹3,000/- + Certificate)

2nd Prize: Olivia Zorinzuali, BCM KNP Chanmari Unit (₹2,000/- + Certificate)

3rd Prize: Brianna Lalngaihawmi, PCI Chanmari (₹1,000/- + Certificate)

Special Mention (₹500/- + Certificate): Baby Malsawmzuali Fanai (UPC Luangmual), Alan VL Lawmkima (PCD Venglai), Lalruatzela (PCD Venglai), F. Lalhlupuii (UPC Ramthar), Lalruathlua (UPC Luangmual)

Attachment

title: Mamit-ah TB Mukt Bharat Abhiyaan Phase 2 -100 Days Campaign kalpui zel
content:
72/2026-2027

Dated : Mamit the 8th of April, 2026 :Vawiin khan TB Mukt Bharat Abhiyaan Phase 2, 100 Days Campaign (Ayushman Arogya Shivir) 4th IR Battalion, Luangpawl, Mamit a neih chu Pu Suvigya S Chandra,District Bawrhsap chuan hun a hmanpui.

District Bawrhsap chuan Mamit District chhungah TB umbo a nih theih nan hma lak mek a ni a, hand held X-ray screening chu khawl tha tak niin TB zawnchhuah nan AI tel an hmang thei chu thil pawimawh tak a nih thu sawiin, tha a tih thu a sawi a, Mamit mipui te pawhin hlut a ngaipawimawh turin a chah.

Hand Held X-ray khawl TB Screening neih nana hman te chu enpuiin, National TB Elimination Programme in hna an thawh dan te District Bawthsap hian a zawt fiah bawk a ni.

He hunah hian Pu VL Lura Hauzel, Commandant leh Pu Lalrinmawia, Dy Commandant 4th IR Bn. te bakah District TB officer Mamit te chuan an telpui.

Mamit District ah 100 Days Campaign (TB zawnchhuah hna) kalpui mek chu Mamit khawchhung atanga tan a ni a, High Risk Village leh Congregate settings atanga tanin, District pumah tih chhoh zel tur a ruahman a ni.

Vawiin TB campaign-ah hian MAS (MSACS) atan Counselling &Testing leh NCD kalpui nghal a ni bawk.

Attachment

title: 2027 CHHIARPUI CHUNGCHANGA THIL TUL LEH PAWIMAWH TE NGAIHTUAH HOVIN KOLASIB AH THUKHAWM
content:
71/2026-2027

Kolasib, 8th April, 2026:Vawiin khan Kolasib Bawrhsap Pu H. Dolianbuaia hovin Kolasib District chhunga Sorkar Department hrang hrang hotute an thukhawm a. He hunah hian Census 2027 atana inpuahchahna leh District hmasawnna tura hmalak dan tur hrang hrangte ngaihtuah ho a ni.

Kolasib District-a Principal Census Officer ni bawk Bawrhsap Pu H. Dolianbuaia chuan Census neih tur chu ngaih pawimawh a tul zia tarlangin, uluk leh fimkhur taka thawk turin hotute a chah a. Mipuite pawhin mahni in-report-na (self-enumeration) chu a hma thei ang bera ti turin a ngen a, self-enumeration tih theih hun chhung hi April 15, 2026 thleng chauh a nih avangin hma la thuai turin a chah bawk a ni.

He hunah hian Bawrhsap Pu H. Dolianbuaia chuan Kolasib District-a officer tha tak takte nena an inhmukhawm thei chu lawmawm a tih thu a sawi a. Kolasib District chu state dang nena ramri a nih avangin 'Law and Order' vawn that a pawimawh zia tarlangin, Mizoram pum tana ei leh bar luhka ber a nih avangin mawhphurhna a sang hle a ni, a ti.

Kolasib District hmasawnna turin sorkar Department hrang hrangte inpumkhat taka thawhho a ngaih thu sawiin, Bawrhsap chuan, "Department pawimawh lo a awm lo," a ti a. Zirna lamah te leh hmasawnna kawng dang dangah district ang zawnga tan rual a tul thu a tarlang bawk.

Tourism lam tihhmasawn chungchang ngaihpawimawh a tul thu tarlangin, Bawrhsap chuan Kolasib chu hmun nuam tak tak, Serlui leh Tuirial ang te awmna a nih avangin, khualzin mite tlawh tlak leh tlawh chak awm taka siam chu tum berah neih a tul thu a sawi a. Hemi denchhen hian Festival lian tham tak te huaihawt nise tha a tih thu a sawi bawk.

Mipuite nena inpawh leh zual taka sorkar hna thawh a tul thu tarlangin, Bawrhsap chuan hun lo kal zel turah DC hovin Department officer-te zin chhuah nise, chumi hunah chuan mipuite'n an mahni mamawh leh harsatnate awlsam taka an thlen theihna hun ruahmansak thin nise mipuiten an tangkaipui takzet a rin thu a sawi bawk.

Vawiin thutkhawmna ah hian Kolasib a Department hrang hrang aiawhte an tel kim hle.
